heading: Purpose
label: 20302 Purpose
text: The purpose of the corporation is to further the interests of literature and the fine arts.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2030236:4202., .Apr. 17, 1916, ch. 77, § 239 Stat. 51The words “is to further” are substituted for “are and shall be the furtherance of” to eliminate unnecessary words.
